All 53 tests passed including all lint-tsc tests. Exit code 0.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. All lint filter tests (53 total in test/lint.test.ts) pass successfully. Each assertion has corresponding tests that exercise the described behavior: TSC error grouping by code with cap and summary, TSC suggestion stripping, ESLint/biome rule grouping with >70% savings, Ruff rule code grouping, and Clippy lint name grouping.
